title: Joint Probability Distributions
description: Multiple random variables, marginals, conditionals, and independence.

lessons.title: Joint PMF
lessons.content:
## Joint PMF

P(X=x, Y=y) for two discrete random variables.

### Key Points

- Study this topic carefully with the interactive examples.
- Practice related questions in the practice section.
- Use the step-by-step solutions when you get stuck.

### Formula

For this topic, refer to the Formula Sheet in the Tools section.

lessons.title: Joint PDF
lessons.content:
## Joint PDF

f(x,y) for two continuous random variables.

### Key Points

- Study this topic carefully with the interactive examples.
- Practice related questions in the practice section.
- Use the step-by-step solutions when you get stuck.

### Formula

For this topic, refer to the Formula Sheet in the Tools section.

lessons.title: Marginal Distributions
lessons.content:
## Marginal Distributions

g(x) = Σ_y P(X=x,Y=y).

### Key Points

- Study this topic carefully with the interactive examples.
- Practice related questions in the practice section.
- Use the step-by-step solutions when you get stuck.

### Formula

For this topic, refer to the Formula Sheet in the Tools section.

lessons.title: Conditional Distributions
lessons.content:
## Conditional Distributions

P(Y=y|X=x) = P(X=x,Y=y)/P(X=x).

### Key Points

- Study this topic carefully with the interactive examples.
- Practice related questions in the practice section.
- Use the step-by-step solutions when you get stuck.

### Formula

For this topic, refer to the Formula Sheet in the Tools section.

lessons.title: Independence
lessons.content:
## Independence

P(X=x,Y=y) = P(X=x)P(Y=y) for all x,y.

### Key Points

- Study this topic carefully with the interactive examples.
- Practice related questions in the practice section.
- Use the step-by-step solutions when you get stuck.

### Formula

For this topic, refer to the Formula Sheet in the Tools section.
